findings.message: Upgradeable contract without storage gap for future variables
findings.suggestion: Add uint256[50] private __gap; at the end of storage variables

findings.message: Function 'withdraw' uses balance checks that could be manipulated
findings.suggestion: Consider adding flash loan guards or using time-weighted values

findings.message: Arithmetic in unchecked block bypasses overflow protection
findings.suggestion: Ensure overflow/underflow is impossible or add manual checks

findings.message: ERC20 transferFrom() return value not checked
findings.suggestion: Use SafeERC20.safeTransferFrom() or check return value

findings.message: ERC20 approve() return value not checked
findings.suggestion: Use SafeERC20.safeApprove() or forceApprove()

findings.message: Arithmetic in unchecked block bypasses overflow protection
findings.suggestion: Ensure overflow/underflow is impossible or add manual checks

findings.suggestion: Use OpenZeppelin's Initializable and add initializer modifier

findings.suggestion: Move constructor logic to initialize() function
